code:
%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#2c3e50', 'primaryTextColor': '#ecf0f1', 'primaryBorderColor': '#7f8c8d', 'lineColor': '#ecf0f1', 'secondaryColor': '#34495e', 'tertiaryColor': '#282c34' }}}%%
gantt
    title Resource Allocation Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section Planning & Architecture
    Technical Architecture Document    :a1, 2025-01-01, 14d
    UI/UX Design                       :a2, after a1, 21d
    Technical Spikes                   :a3, after a1, 28d

    section Core Development
    Database Schema Implementation     :b1, after a1, 14d
    Authentication & Authorization     :b2, after b1, 14d
    User & Team Management             :b3, after b2, 21d
    Category Management                :b4, after b3, 14d
    Todo Management                    :b5, after b4, 14d
    Admin Portal (Filament)            :b6, after b2, 28d

    section Advanced Features
    Advanced Team & Category Management :c1, after b4, 14d
    Blogging Feature                   :c2, after b5, 21d
    Basic Chat Functionality           :c3, after b3, 21d
    Advanced Chat Features             :c4, after c3, 28d
    Public API                         :c5, after c2, 21d
    Advanced Reporting                 :c6, after c5, 21d

    section Testing & Refinement
    Performance Optimization           :d1, after c4, 14d
    Security Testing                   :d2, after c5, 14d
    User Acceptance Testing            :d3, after d1, 14d

    section Deployment & Training
    Production Deployment              :e1, after d3, 7d
    User Training                      :e2, after e1, 14d

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为整个资源分配项目制定一个详细的时间线。我设想分成五个主要阶段：Planning & Architecture、Core Development、Advanced Features、Testing & Refinement，最后是Deployment & Training。你觉得这个结构合理吗？
五个阶段的划分很清晰。我注意到您提到了Filament，是要用Filament来做Admin Portal吗？另外Technical Architecture Document作为第一个任务，我假设从2025年1月1日开始，持续两周？
对的，Admin Portal用Filament框架。Technical Architecture Document确实是起点，14天。完成后并行启动UI/UX Design和Technical Spikes，但后者可以长一些，28天。Database Schema必须在架构文档完成后就开始，它是后续所有开发的基础。
明白了，我先把Planning和Core Development的前几个任务连起来。Authentication & Authorization要等Database Schema完成后才能开始对吧？然后User & Team Management依赖认证模块？
没错，b1→b2→b3这个链条很关键。Category Management和Todo Management要串行，但Admin Portal (Filament)可以和它们并行，因为它只需要认证模块完成就可以启动，持续28天覆盖整个核心开发周期。
Advanced Features这块我梳理一下：Advanced Team & Category Management要等Category Management做完，Blogging依赖Todo Management，Basic Chat从User & Team Management后开始。但Advanced Chat Features需要等Basic Chat完成，这个我理解对吗？
等等，Basic Chat的依赖我写错了——它应该等b3（User & Team Management）完成，这个是对的。但Advanced Chat Features 28天，之后要接Performance Optimization。另外Public API要等Blogging做完，然后Advanced Reporting接在Public API后面。

好的，我修正了依赖关系。Testing阶段：Performance Optimization在Advanced Chat之后，Security Testing接Public API，User Acceptance Testing要同时等Performance Optimization完成。最后Deployment & Training串行，Production Deployment 7天，然后User Training 14天。
完美，整个时间线逻辑通了。从Technical Architecture Document开始，到User Training结束，所有关键路径都覆盖到了。Admin Portal用Filament、Authentication & Authorization的基础架构、还有最后Public API和Advanced Reporting的收尾，都安排得合理。
